channel.title: Automation on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Automation on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: GitHub Agentic Workflows is now in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Agentic Workflows is now in public preview. It lets you automate reasoning-based tasks such as issue triage, CI failure analysis, and documentation updates using coding agents inside GitHub.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: devops+ai: 🔥The Orchestrator Pattern - Turning CLAUDE.md Into an Autonomous Agent Team Pipeline🔥
item.description:
The article presents an “orchestrator pattern” for using CLAUDE.md to coordinate multiple autonomous agents across the software delivery lifecycle. It frames the approach as a way to delegate SDLC tasks to agent pipelines.

  • Source: Let’s do DevOps
